-Wl,--disable-new-dtags -Wl,--allow-shlib-undefined -Wl,--unresolved-symbols=ignore-in-shared-libs CMakeFiles/gsdk_basic_example.dir/examples/sdk_basic_example.cpp.o -o bin/gsdk_basic_example
